name: professional-web-design-agents
description: Multi-agent system for building polished React websites with UI systems, motion, WebGL, typography, color, accessibility, and code review.

interface.shortDescription: Ship high-quality React websites with specialist design agents.
interface.longDescription: Routes website work through specialist agents for components, typography, color, GSAP, Vanta, Three.js, Lenis, React Bits, Magic MCP, research, review, and execution.
defaultPrompt: Plan and build this website with specialist agents.
Audit this UI for polish, performance, and accessibility.
Add premium motion and WebGL without hurting UX.
